title: The Easiest Way To Make High Quality Graphene
description: As far as I know this is a new method invented by me - so don't bother trying to patent it as this video will show my priority date and I have no intentions of patenting it - it's for everybody - hope it helps.  There are kits available to make graphene using the exfoliation method and many other materials for your own experimenting available from our webshop at www.workingink.co.uk.
